query:
INSERT INTO emoji_image_scan_retry (emoji_id, url, last_error)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
            ON CONFLICT (emoji_id) DO UPDATE
            SET retry_count = emoji_image_scan_retry.retry_count + 1,
                url = EXCLUDED.url,
                last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
                updated_at = now()
